title: Find Log Gaps
description:
Each line is a Unix timestamp. Sort the timestamps and find gaps between consecutive entries greater than 30 seconds.

Return each gap as `start end duration` on its own line, sorted by start ascending.

Return an empty string if no gaps are found.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results
